stories.title: LIV Season Finale in Jeopardy — "Highly Unlikely" Per Kaymer

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf's $40M season finale is "highly unlikely" to happen.

Per Cleeks GC captain Martin Kaymer, speaking publicly this week.

Saudi PIF pulling backing after 2026. CEO O'Neil needs $350M by September.

Players don't know if LIV exists in 2027.

#LIVGolf #Golf

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf CEO O'Neil races a September 2026 deadline to raise $350M.

The Saudi PIF — which invested £3.75B over 3 years — is out.

The next 3 events (UK, New Jersey, Indianapolis) are expected to proceed.

After that? Nobody knows.

#LIVGolf #Golf

article.headline: LIV Golf's $40 Million Season Finale Is "Highly Unlikely" to Happen

stories.title: 3M Open Round 1 — Scheffler Makes TPC Twin Cities Debut

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Round 1 of the 3M Open is underway at TPC Twin Cities.

Scottie Scheffler — World No. 1 — is making his debut at this event. He flew straight from Royal Birkdale to Minnesota.

First missed cut in 4 years at The Open. Now he wants to remind everyone who's No. 1.

#PGATour #3MOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
3M Open stakes this week:

500 FedExCup points on the line.
3 events left before the Playoffs.

Scheffler leads at 3,823 FedExCup points — but Day, Harman, and Finau are fighting for their seasons.

Every shot counts.

#PGATour #3MOpen #FedExCup

article.headline: Scottie Scheffler Makes His 3M Open Debut — And the World's Best Player Is on a Mission

stories.title: LIV Golf UK Round 1 — Niemann Leads at -6, Legion XIII Tops Team Standings

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf UK Round 1 results:

Joaquin Niemann — -6 (64), bogey-free
Lee Westwood — -5
Bubba Watson / Carlos Ortiz — -5

Teams: Legion XIII, Stinger GC, Torque GC — all tied at -11.

Jon Rahm is chasing his 3rd straight individual title at JCB.

#LIVGolf #Golf

stories.title: Women's Scottish Open at Dundonald Links — Korda and Woad Headline

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Women's Scottish Open is underway at Dundonald Links.

Field includes:
— Nelly Korda (World No. 1)
— Lottie Woad (World No. 4)
— Defending champion Lauren Coughlin
— 19 major champions

Final event before the AIG Women's Open (last major of 2026).

#LPGA #WomensGolf #Golf

stories.title: Haeran Ryu's Historic LPGA Double — Two Majors in Four Weeks

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Haeran Ryu has won two LPGA majors in 2026.

KPMG Women's PGA Championship — June 25-28
Amundi Evian Championship — July 9-12

Two majors. Four weeks apart.

Ryu is having one of the great women's golf seasons of recent years.

Let that sink in.

#LPGA #Golf

article.headline: Haeran Ryu Has Won Two LPGA Majors in 2026 — and the Season Isn't Over
